case_title: NORCAL HOLDING, LLC. VS. ANDREJ GRUBACIC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-02-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRUBACIC, ANDREJ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-31-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ, CHARLOETE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCAL HOLDING, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRUBACIC, ANDREJ
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,273.07 FILED BY NORCAL HOLDING, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GRUBACIC, ANDREJ SAENZ, CHARLOETE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCAL HOLDING, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ, CHARLOETE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORCAL HOLDING, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, REPRESENTED BY THOMAS IVELI, MANAGING MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
